caption.text:
Comment for 🔗 

This Plix pineapple face serum helps reduce dark spots and pigmentation, it also fades discolouration
-Evens out your skin.
-Include this in your am and pm routine
-Feels very lightweight and non greasy

De-pigmentation serum, Dark spots serum, Uneven skin tone serum, Brightening serum, Dull skin care, Glow boosting serum, Clear skin routine, Dewy finish serum, Glass skin glow, Hydrating serum, Plump skin care, Healthy skin glow

#plixpineappleserum#pigmentation#plixpigmentation#skincare#darkspots
